name: Fucoxanthin
summary: Fucoxanthin is tracked for May increase thermogenesis via UCP1 activation and fat oxidation pathways with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.

safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
